title: Functions, Scope, and Callable Contracts · Runtime Lens: Python Recursion Iteration
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable calculations, validators, and reporting functions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python recursion iteration increment in a function-oriented support workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose recursion or iteration from data shape, termination, depth, state, and readability constraints.
Write modern annotations for function inputs and outputs while recognizing that Python does not enforce them at runtime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
